title: No Precision Mechanism Junk
description: ever HATE that you get a COGWHEEL or CLOCK from making a Precision Mechanism?!!!!?!?! Great! yeah
body:
ok so I was making aprecision mechanism for another rotaiton speed controller. very beautiful. very powerful. but Then, it gave me A COGWHEEL !!!!! A COGWHEEL!!!! INSTEAD OF MY BEAUTIFUL, POWERFUL PRECISION MECHANISM !!!!!!!!!!!!1! I plan to abolish all junk loot by 2021.

(this datapack replaces the junk salvage from the precision mechanism recipe with just pure precision mechanism.)  
![Adjusted Precision Mechanism Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d63bcdb9dcbeb640128678c1e4c3e03a9f87edf2.png)
